skills.name: Appraisal
skills.description: Inspect entities and items to reveal quality and risk.

skills.name: X-Ray Instinct
skills.description: Sense hidden traps and contents without opening containers.

skills.name: Deep Appraisal
skills.description: Advanced appraisal that reveals hidden bonuses and faction clues.

skills.name: Trap Vision
skills.description: Evolved xray skill specialized in trap prediction and bypass.

skills.name: Keen Eye
skills.description: Perceive value and patterns in crowded rooms.

skills.name: Shadow Hand
skills.description: Steal from distracted targets when opportunity appears.

skills.name: Battle Broadcast
skills.description: Turn danger into audience momentum while streaming.

skills.name: Riposte
skills.description: Counter after a successful block in close combat.

skills.name: Guardian Step
skills.description: Protect companions by controlling spacing and threat.

skills.name: Rumorcraft
skills.description: Shape rumor spread and increase misinformation resistance.

skills.name: Rune Smith
skills.description: Refine effects and reroll weak room/item synergy outcomes.

skills.name: Pulse Sense
skills.description: Detect nearby hostiles and faction presence without direct sight.

archetypes.label: Wanderer
archetypes.description: Flexible explorer with balanced growth and adaptation.

archetypes.label: Delver
archetypes.description: Resource-focused scavenger who excels in treasure and survival loops.

archetypes.label: Warden
archetypes.description: Disciplined protector focused on control, defense, and attrition.

archetypes.label: Hunter
archetypes.description: Aggressive pursuer optimized for combat pressure and momentum spikes.

archetypes.label: Tactician
archetypes.description: Information-first strategist who converts insight into leverage.

archetypes.label: Showrunner
archetypes.description: Fame-driven performer who grows stronger through audience pressure.

options.label: Loot the treasure cache
options.line: I pry open the cache and take what I can.
options.responseText: You salvage useful supplies from the opened cache.

options.label: Say: I wish something else was here
options.line: I wish something else was here.
options.responseText: You stare at the empty corner and note what has changed.

options.label: Appraise the cache seals
options.line: The lockwork tells a story if I read it closely.
options.responseText: You map hidden mechanisms and extract cleaner salvage routes.

options.label: Make a discipline oath
options.line: No wasted motion. No wasted turns.
options.responseText: You lock into a strict routine.

options.label: Ask for a sparring drill
options.line: Push me to the edge. I need real pressure.
options.responseText: The drill is brutal but your rhythm sharpens.

options.label: Ask about hidden routes
options.line: Tell me what path you saw last.
options.responseText: The reply gives you clues about nearby corridors.

options.label: Trade rumors
options.line: I heard movement near the forge. What did you hear?
options.responseText: The conversation reshapes what both of you think is true.

options.label: Direct interrogation
options.line: Drop the story. Give me facts.
options.responseText: You get sharper details, but the room temperature drops.

options.label: Probe warden patrol pattern
options.line: When does the Depth Warden switch rotations?
options.responseText: You piece together patrol timings and mark a safer window.

options.label: Guided breathing
options.line: Inhale four counts. Hold. Exhale slow.
options.responseText: Your pulse stabilizes and panic drains out.

options.label: Tell a dark joke
options.line: If we survive, this is still going in the stream highlight reel.
options.responseText: Someone laughs. The tension breaks for a minute.

options.label: Etch rune notes
options.line: These symbols are a language; I need to keep the grammar.
options.responseText: Your notes reveal consistent rune behavior patterns.

options.label: Livestream the forge pulse
options.line: Watch this, chat. The room is alive.
options.responseText: The stream spikes as the forge reacts to your cadence.

quests.title: Break the Surface
quests.description: Find each level exit and reach the final gate.

quests.title: Steel in the Dark
quests.description: Train six times to survive upper levels.

quests.title: Dungeon Chronicle
quests.description: Complete chapter logs from depth 12 to depth 1.

events.message: Dungeon alert rises: spawned enemies are now 2 levels stronger.
Your stream reaches the upper halls. More eyes are watching now.
Rune resonance surges through the floor and twists intent vectors.
